title.index.description: Main title for the subsite management homepage

title.create.description: Title for the new subsite dialog

title.openNow.description: Title for the dialog asking if the user wants to redirect immediately after successful creation

field.slug.description: Title for the subsite slug input field

field.origin.description: Domain column in the subsite list

field.createdAt.description: Column for the subsite creation time

field.actions.description: Column for actions in the subsite list

placeholder.slug.description: Placeholder for the slug input field

placeholder.title.message: Displayed in the subsite browser tab and site header
placeholder.title.description: Placeholder for the title input field

message.indexTip.message: Create independent brand subsites under the main site, each subsite can have its own logo, title, and feature set without needing to build separate source code.
message.indexTip.description: Description text for the subsite management homepage

message.empty.message: You have not created any subsites yet. Click 'Create Subsite' in the top right to get started.

message.slugTip.message: 3-32 lowercase letters, numbers, or hyphens; cannot start or end with a hyphen, and cannot contain consecutive hyphens.

message.slugInvalid.message: Subdomain prefix format is incorrect, please check the rules and try again.

message.zoneMissing.message: The current main site is not configured with a subdomain zone, please contact the site administrator.

message.createFailed.message: Failed to create subsite, please try again later.

message.loadFailed.message: Failed to load the subsite list.
message.loadFailed.description: Indicates failure to load the list

message.openNowConfirm.message: Subsite {origin} has been created. Would you like to open it now to continue configuration?
message.openNowConfirm.description: Asks if the user wants to open immediately after creation
